framework: A path qualifies only when >=3 prominent, proven people in the field visibly share the capability, each with a resolving link — the pattern across standouts is the evidence, not market demand. Ranked by strength of that pattern. Curated editorial, not DOL-derived.

paths.path: Originate and publish a named pattern from client work
paths.what_it_is: Turn a solution pattern discovered while solving real client problems into a clearly named, publicly written methodology (a book, long-form essay series, or open pattern language) that other practitioners can pick up and use.
paths.why_it_signals: Multiple senior technologists at the same consultancy, working independently on different client problems, each converged on the same craft of extracting and publishing a named methodology from their engagements (refactoring, microservices, data mesh, evolutionary architecture) — showing it is a repeatable practice, not one person's luck or fame.

paths.path: Independent specialist with a public technical voice
paths.what_it_is: Pick one narrow technical domain (a cloud platform or a specific service class within it), build deep hands-on expertise through real production work, and consistently publish that expertise as an independent consultant rather than as an employee of the vendor.
paths.why_it_signals: Three separate independent consultants each built distinct solo practices around a narrow cloud specialty, and each earned the vendor's own public recognition (AWS Hero) purely by demonstrating and teaching that expertise — showing the pattern of depth-plus-visibility is buildable, not circumstantial.

paths.path: Single-platform mastery with vendor community recognition
paths.what_it_is: Specialize in one enterprise SaaS platform deeply enough — architecture, certifications, and years of public teaching and community contribution — to earn the platform vendor's own recognition (e.g., Salesforce MVP) on top of delivering client implementations as a consultant.
paths.why_it_signals: Multiple independent consultants earned this vendor-level recognition through the same combination of implementation depth and public teaching rather than through any single employer or client name, showing platform depth plus community contribution is a repeatable craft for standing out.
